steps.title: Find the clarification signal
steps.content: The passage introduces the 899 BCE eclipse as “annular,” then immediately explains what this term means: the Moon didn't cover the Sun completely, creating a ring of fire. The transition must signal clarification or elaboration.

steps.title: Apply the clarification transition
steps.content: ”That is,” signals we're defining a term—explaining what “annular” means. The other options fail: “For example,” “Meanwhile,” and “Nonetheless” express new instances, simultaneity, and contrast, none fitting here. That matches choice C — C is correct.
